title: pelargonium × diaphanum
intro: Pelargonium × diaphanum, also known as Mountain Rose or White Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, relieving coughs and sore throats, and promoting skin health due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × diaphanum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
